title: ophioglossum vulgatum var. microstichum
intro: Ophioglossum vulgatum var. microstichum, also known as the adder's tongue fern, is a variety of the adder's tongue fern plant that belongs to the Ophioglossaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Ophioglossum vulgatum var. microstichum include its potential to lower blood sugar levels, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of various respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis. In herbal preparations, the plant's rhizome and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
